subject: english
learning_objectives: Identify the parts of a formal letter
Write a formal letter using the correct format

sections.heading: Meaning
sections.content: A formal letter, also called an official letter, is written to people in their official positions and must remain impersonal even when the writer knows the addressee personally.

sections.heading: Features
sections.content: The note lists the writer's address, date, receiver's address, salutation, heading or title, body of the letter, and complimentary close.

sections.heading: Style Rules
sections.content: The body should go straight to the purpose of the letter. Slang, colloquial expressions, abbreviations, and contracted forms are not allowed. The recommended close is 'Yours faithfully,' followed by signature and full name.
